title: erica barnettiana
side_effects: Erica barnettiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate due to its stimulant properties. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea as the body tries to eliminate the toxins. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils can also cause respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma attacks. Furthermore, improper use of Erica barnettiana may interact with certain medications, including blood thinners and diabetes medications.
